sections.heading: Build Variants
sections.content: Combine a build type (debug/release) with a product flavor (free/paid, dev/prod) to create multiple app versions from one codebase. Build types control compilation settings (minification, debugging, signing), while flavors control features, branding, or environment.

rows.description: Controls compilation and packaging. Examples: debug, release, staging. Configured in buildTypes { }.
Controls features, branding, or environment. Examples: free, paid, dev, prod. Define in productFlavors { } with flavorDimensions.
Final combination of build type + flavor. Examples: freeDebug, paidRelease.
Constants per flavor or build type (API URLs, feature flags). Access via BuildConfig.FIELD_NAME.

sections.heading: App Signing
sections.content: All APKs/AABs must be signed. Use a secure release keystore. Never commit passwords; store locally in local.properties or use CI environment variables. Back up keystore securely.

sections.heading: Google Play App Signing
sections.content: Upload apps as AAB signed with your upload key. Google re-signs with the app signing key. Losing the keystore prevents updates.

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Build variants plus secure signing and flavor-specific configs allow safe, flexible, multi-version app releases from a single codebase.
